description:
Typed AST → Cranelift IR for the in-scope subset, with no driver yet.

Scope:
- Value types: int (i64), float (f64), bool (i8), atom (interned u32), nil, tuples-of-scalars (struct-like, fixed layout).
- Operations: +, -, *, /, %, comparisons, &&, ||, !.
- Control: if/else; case on literal + tuple patterns (scalar leaves only); direct calls.
- No multi-clause yet (single-clause functions only — multi-clause lands in .12e).
- No tail-call lowering yet (.12e).

Out: closures, heap types, builtins-with-runtime-state. Builtin calls land in .12b.

Verification: emit CLIF, run cranelift verifier, snapshot tests on representative functions (arith, tuple destructure, nested if). No JIT, no binary, no execution yet — that comes in .12c/.12d.
title: CLIF lowering core (scalars + tuples-of-scalars)
